note: Illustrative sample records only. They are fictional examples for contract validation.

items.title: Sample: Community raises concern about access path near the coast
items.cleaned_text: Community members described intermittent blockage near a coastal access path and asked local agencies for clarification.

items.title: Sample: Local response follows reports about coastal path access
items.cleaned_text: A follow-up report described agency outreach and additional community feedback regarding access conditions.

items.title: Sample: Shoreline development proposal in Aguadilla moves through filings
items.cleaned_text: The article described a shoreline project proposal and summarized current filing and review milestones.

items.title: Sample: Loiza shoreline erosion response remains under discussion
items.cleaned_text: The article covered erosion impacts and described proposals for response measures without confirming a final construction decision.

items.title: Sample: Salinas permitting notice raises questions under review
items.cleaned_text: The article references an unresolved permitting dispute and contains language that requires human review before publication.
